receiptFields.name: runId
receiptFields.description: Identifier for the overall run session that produced this receipt.

receiptFields.name: operationId
receiptFields.description: Identifier for the specific operation within the run.

receiptFields.name: completedAt
receiptFields.description: Timestamp when the operation completed (null if still running or canceled mid-flight).

receiptFields.name: action
receiptFields.description: Human-readable label of the action performed (e.g. 'Apply Spicetify', 'Block Updates').

receiptFields.name: planHash
receiptFields.description: SHA-256 hash of the preflight plan that was executed, for integrity verification.

receiptFields.name: errorSummary
receiptFields.description: Short summary of the error if status is 'failed' or 'partialSuccess'. Null on success.

receiptFields.name: undoAvailable
receiptFields.description: Whether undo is available for this operation based on captured state and token reversibility.

receiptFields.name: logRef
receiptFields.description: Reference path or identifier to the sanitized log file for this operation.

operationEntryFields.name: tokenKind
operationEntryFields.description: The operation token type kind (matches a kind value from operation-token-types.json).

operationEntryFields.name: target
operationEntryFields.description: The target of the operation (e.g. file path, PATH entry value, task name).

operationEntryFields.name: previousStateRef
operationEntryFields.description: Reference to the captured previous state (file path, snapshot id, or inline value). Null if state was not captured.

operationEntryFields.name: newState
operationEntryFields.description: Description or reference to the new state after the operation.

operationEntryFields.name: result
operationEntryFields.description: Outcome of this individual operation entry.

operationEntryFields.name: reversible
operationEntryFields.description: Whether this specific operation entry is reversible (may differ from token type default if state capture failed).

operationEntryFields.name: undoAction
operationEntryFields.description: Description of the undo action for this entry, or reason undo is not available.

operationEntryFields.name: risk
operationEntryFields.description: Risk level of this operation entry.

statusValues.description: All operations in the run completed successfully.
The run encountered a fatal error and did not complete.
The run was canceled by the user before completion.
The run executed in dry-run mode; no mutations were applied.
Some operations succeeded but one or more failed or were skipped.
